title: Magical Spells
description:
Ever felt like using magic in minecraft?
Something without the need of forge or fabric?
Then this datapack is for you!
this datapack adds some magic to your minecraft world!
It has many different types of spells!
body:
Wait you want something unique? something that works without the need of Fabric or Forge Installer?
I got you!
This datapack is about some Magical spells which have special abilities to make Vanilla Minecraft fun again!!
Each of the spells have a click , sneak and a Special one time use ability.
use "/function <spell name>" to recieve the desired spell(use tab because spells name are a bit complicated).
Use the normal Version of spell by clicking a specific amount of times (will be mentioned above hotbar when using a spell).
You can sneak to use the rage mode of a spell but the rage mode comes with a cost...
if you use rage mode of a spell it will take something as a sacrifice.
To use the Special ability of a spell use "/trigger <ability>" but be careful using this as you get to use this ability once in a lifetime!
Some of the special abilities are very dangerous and can cause seriouse damage to builds, bases and other structures that comes in their way!
Thanks for Downloading this datapack!
